slides.title: Start with *incline*
slides.body: Most chests are weak up top. Prioritize incline.

slides.title: Get a deep *stretch*
slides.body: Stretch at the bottom. That is where growth lives.

slides.title: Add *flyes*
slides.body: Presses build size, flyes build the stretch.

slides.title: Add *weight*
slides.body: Bench more over time or stay the same.

slides.title: Build the *chest*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
